rows.label: qev065301_MSG0001
rows.name:
Oh, my, my?
Could you be [ST:playername ]?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065301_MSG0002
rows.name:
Just like Eri said,
you're quite a catch!
I don't dislike people like you, you know.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065301_JNK0010
rows.name: Thank

rows.label: qev065301_SEL0011
rows.name: Express your gratitude for now.

rows.label: qev065301_JNK0020
rows.name: Question

rows.label: qev065301_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask who Eri is.

rows.label: qev065301_MSG0003
rows.name: Hehehe, then let's shake hands! Handshake![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065301_MSG0004
rows.name:
...Wait, Eri?
Why are you pouting?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065301_MSG0005
rows.name: I am not letting my emotions run wild over such a thing...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065301_MSG0006
rows.name:
However... I simply do not want you to speak so rudely
to my savior.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065301_MSG0007
rows.name: Eri is...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065301_MSG0008
rows.name:
Ah, speak of the devil and she shall appear.
Does looking at her ring any bells?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065301_MSG0009
rows.name:
Lyvia, [ST:gender p1=he is p2=she is ] an ordinary Earthling.
There is no way [ST:gender p1=he p2=she ] would notice, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065301_MSG0010
rows.name:
...You took care of me a while ago.
I am the Definian, Erio.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065301_MSG0011
rows.name:
I am living in this form now.
How is it? Is this me strange?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065301_JNK0030
rows.name: Praise

rows.label: qev065301_SEL0031
rows.name: Say it is to your liking.

rows.label: qev065301_JNK0040
rows.name: Criticize

rows.label: qev065301_SEL0041
rows.name: Say it is not your preference.

rows.label: qev065301_MSG0012
rows.name:
Is that so... I'm glad to hear that...
You truly are kind.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065301_MSG0013
rows.name:
Oh my, Eri is turning bright red!
Are you that interested in this person?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065301_MSG0014
rows.name:
You are honest as always.
I see... So this won't do...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065301_MSG0015
rows.name:
Oh my, Eri is feeling down!
Hehe, [ST:playername ] is quite the bad [ST:gender p1=boy p2=girl ], huh![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065301_MSG0016
rows.name:
Hehe!
But, even though we only spoke for a bit,
I can understand why Eri is interested... maybe?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065301_MSG0017
rows.name:
Earthlings really are interesting, aren't they.
I want an Earthling boyfriend too![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065301_MSG0018
rows.name:
[ST:playername ] is simply my savior...
Stop phrasing things in a way that causes misunderstandings.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065301_MSG0019
rows.name:
Furthermore, I have said this many times, but we are Definians.
There is no way we could ever comprehend emotions such as romance.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065301_MSG0020
rows.name:
Hmph!
You won't know that unless you try, right![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065301_MSG0021
rows.name:
Say, [ST:playername ], I have a favor to ask.
I want you to bring me a suitable candidate for a boyfriend.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065301_MSG0022
rows.name:
Right? Please!
Rather than me asking out of nowhere, having an Earthling like you
invite them will surprise them less, wouldn't it?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065301_MSG0023
rows.name:
Yay!
Truthfully, I have already picked out a few men
who seem like good choices.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065301_MSG0024
rows.name:
Maxim, Kent D. Carr, Giotto...
I want you to talk to these three and bring the one
you think seems the best.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065301_MSG0025
rows.name: Then I'll show you that even Definians can properly engage in romance![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065301_MSG0026
rows.name:
This is the one request of my life!
I want to experience a burning romance.
Bring me a suitable candidate for a boyfriend![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065301_MSG0027
rows.name:
Yay!
Truthfully, I have already picked out a few men
who seem like good choices.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065301_MSG0028
rows.name:
Maxim, Kent D. Carr, Giotto...
I want you to talk to these three and bring the one
you think seems the best.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065301_MSG0029
rows.name: Then I'll show you that even Definians can properly engage in romance![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065301_MSG0030
rows.name:
The names of the men I found are
Maxim, Kent D. Carr, and Giotto!
Bring me someone who seems good![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065301_MSG0031
rows.name:
Heeh! You brought Maxim.
It's true that he is interesting to talk to,
and he might not be a bad choice for a boyfriend![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065301_MSG0032
rows.name:
Heeh! You brought Kent D. Carr.
It's true that he seems smart,
and he might not be a bad choice for a boyfriend![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065301_MSG0033
rows.name:
Heeh! You brought Giotto.
It's true that he seems energetic,
and he might not be a bad choice for a boyfriend![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065301_MSG0034
rows.name: Now it's just a matter of how I should approach him.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065301_MSG0035
rows.name: Say, how do you win over girls?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065301_JNK0090
rows.name: Propose

rows.label: qev065301_SEL0091
rows.name: Tell her to hand over a present.

rows.label: qev065301_JNK0100
rows.name: Deny

rows.label: qev065301_SEL0101
rows.name: Tell her you don't know because you have no experience.

rows.label: qev065301_MSG0036
rows.name:
Heeh, are you the devoted type?
I also like kind men.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065301_MSG0037
rows.name:
In that case, maybe I'll give him a White Passeran,
a Muranadenium, and a Primitive Colossus Statue as a present.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065301_MSG0038
rows.name:
Eh... Even Eri is crazy about you, so...
I thought you were super popular with everyone...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065301_MSG0039
rows.name:
So that's not the case... Heeh...
That's a bit surprising, I guess?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065301_MSG0040
rows.name:
...Then I suppose I'll hand over a present.
No matter what kind of alien they are,
there is no one who wouldn't be happy to receive an item.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065301_MSG0041
rows.name:
The things to give... Let's see.
A White Passeran, a Muranadenium,
and a Primitive Colossus Statue should be fine.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065301_MSG0042
rows.name:
Hehe, I'll be waiting here, so go fetch them for me!
Please![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065301_MSG0043
rows.name: Please! Hurry and fetch the presents for me![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065301_MSG0044
rows.name: With those, I will surely grab hold of his heart![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065301_MSG0083
rows.name:
Ah, welcome back!
While I was waiting for you, I was talking with Maxim.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065301_MSG0084
rows.name: Maxim told me one interesting story after another.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065301_MSG0085
rows.name:
You have a good eye for people, don't you.
Thank you for bringing me such a wonderful person.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065301_MSG0086
rows.name:
That is an honor, young lady.
I am also very happy to have met such a lovely woman like you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065301_MSG0087
rows.name:
Ah, welcome back!
While I was waiting for you, I was talking with Kent.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065301_MSG0088
rows.name:
Kent taught me all sorts of knowledge one after another
in an easy-to-understand way.
I feel like I've become smarter.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065301_MSG0089
rows.name:
You have a good eye for people, don't you.
Thank you for bringing me such a wonderful person.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065301_MSG0090
rows.name:
You are the first woman to ever take such an interest
in my boring stories...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065301_MSG0092
rows.name:
Ah, welcome back!
While I was waiting for you, I was talking with Giotto.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065301_MSG0093
rows.name:
Giotto told me one fun story after another
about his jobs as a BLADE.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065301_MSG0094
rows.name:
You have a good eye for people, don't you.
Thank you for bringing me such a wonderful person.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065301_MSG0095
rows.name:
Man... I've never been able to talk to a woman so casually
like this before in my entire life.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065301_MSG0097
rows.name:
...Hehe, so how did it go?
Did you get the presents?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065301_MSG0098
rows.name:
Wow... You really brought all of them...
It was tough, wasn't it?
It's a bit late for this now, but... I'm sorry.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065301_MSG0099
rows.name:
For some reason, you have this accommodating aura that makes it seem
like you'll listen to any request, so I ended up depending on you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065301_JNK0130
rows.name: Modesty

rows.label: qev065301_SEL0131
rows.name: Say that you don't have that kind of aura.

rows.label: qev065301_JNK0140
rows.name: Bashful

rows.label: qev065301_SEL0141
rows.name: Blush and show that you are bashful.

rows.label: qev065301_MSG0100
rows.name:
And then you go and say something like that.
It's so cool.
Hehe, you feel like a mature adult![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065301_MSG0101
rows.name:
Hehe, it's so cute that you get bashful.
Showing a face like that occasionally must be part of your charm, isn't it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065301_MSG0102
rows.name: Well then, I'll take these...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065301_MSG0103
rows.name:
[ST:playername ]... and give them to you!
I thought about it a lot, but it seems I'm more interested
in you than anyone else.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065301_MSG0104
rows.name: Eh...!?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065301_MSG0105
rows.name:
I'm sorry, Maxim!
While I was talking to you, I realized something.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065301_MSG0106
rows.name: The person I hold special feelings for is... [ST:playername ].[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065301_MSG0107
rows.name:
Besides, if you saw my true form...
You would surely come to hate me.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065301_MSG0108
rows.name:
That's not true!
I would accept everything about you![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065301_MSG0109
rows.name:
Haha, really?
Then I'll show you. You see, I...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065301_MSG0110
rows.name: Have a form like this, you know?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065301_MSG0111
rows.name: Hii...! Gyaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaah!![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065301_MSG0112
rows.name: Haha... As expected, he ran away...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065301_MSG0113
rows.name: That was...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065301_MSG0114
rows.name:
I'm sorry, Kent!
While I was talking to you, I realized something.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065301_MSG0115
rows.name: The person I hold special feelings for is... [ST:playername ].[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065301_MSG0116
rows.name:
Besides, if you saw my true form...
You would surely come to hate me.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065301_MSG0117
rows.name:
...If it were me, I wouldn't be surprised
no matter what form you took.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065301_MSG0118
rows.name:
Haha, really?
Then I'll show you. You see, I...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065301_MSG0119
rows.name: Have a form like this, you know?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065301_MSG0120
rows.name: ...I see, this is indeed fascinating.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065301_MSG0121
rows.name:
However, since the one you need is not me,
there is no reason for me to remain here.
Please excuse me.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065301_MSG0122
rows.name:
He really wasn't surprised...
He's kind of an amazing person, isn't he.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065301_MSG0123
rows.name: H-Hey![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065301_MSG0124
rows.name:
I'm sorry, Giotto!
While I was talking to you, I realized something.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065301_MSG0125
rows.name: The person I hold special feelings for is... [ST:playername ].[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065301_MSG0126
rows.name:
Besides, if you saw my true form...
You would surely come to hate me.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065301_MSG0127
rows.name:
There's no way that's true!
No matter what form you take, Lyvia is Lyvia![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065301_MSG0128
rows.name:
Haha, really?
Then I'll show you. You see, I...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065301_MSG0129
rows.name: Have a form like this, you know?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065301_MSG0130
rows.name:
Hmph, a form like that isn't scary at all.
I've fought with crazy aliens countless times.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065301_MSG0131
rows.name:
It's just... being rejected by you is what hits hard.
You're the first woman like this I've met,
so I was actually getting pretty carried away.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065301_MSG0132
rows.name:
...Well, it can't be helped.
See ya, just talking with you was fun enough.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065301_MSG0133
rows.name:
I'm sorry, Giotto...
I feel like I did something bad.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065301_MSG0134
rows.name:
...So, [ST:playername ]?
What about you? Do you hate me?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065301_JNK0150
rows.name: Deny

rows.label: qev065301_SEL0151
rows.name: Tell her you do not hate her.

rows.label: qev065301_JNK0160
rows.name: Affirm

rows.label: qev065301_SEL0161
rows.name: Gently tell her she is not your type.

rows.label: qev065301_MSG0135
rows.name:
Really!?
Then...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065301_MSG0136
rows.name:
No way!!
But I won't give up, you know?
I'll keep approaching you until you turn my way...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065301_MSG0137
rows.name:
...Stop it, Lyvia!!
Do not say strange things to [ST:playername ].[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065301_MSG0138
rows.name:
Eh? I'm not saying anything strange.
Just that I like [ST:gender p1=him p2=her ]...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065301_MSG0139
rows.name:
That is exactly it! For some reason, when I hear those words,
my chest feels like it is being torn apart.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065301_MSG0140
rows.name:
I do not understand the reason, but... stop it, Lyvia.
At this rate, even I will become strange...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065301_MSG0141
rows.name: ...Ah-ha, I see how it is.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065301_MSG0142
rows.name: I don't hate Eri either, so I'll call a truce for now![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065301_MSG0143
rows.name:
...Hehe, you are quite the heartbreaker, [ST:playername ].
Driving two Definians crazy like this.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065301_MSG0144
rows.name:
This is a small token of my feelings.
Please accept it.
Um... I don't need anything in return for now![ST:wait ]
